props.heading: Key Features of CELPIP for Nurses

features.title: Real-Life Evaluation
features.desc: CELPIP assesses your English skills in real-life scenarios, ensuring you are well-prepared for your nursing career in Canada.

features.title: Flexible Testing
features.desc: With CELPIP's online testing option, you can choose a convenient time that fits your busy schedule, just like Maria Santos from Cebu.

features.title: Practice Materials
features.desc: Access a variety of practice materials to help you prepare effectively and boost your confidence as you aim for a high CLB score.

props.imageAlt: Maria Santos celebrating her CELPIP success in Toronto
props.oneLineMoment: Maria Santos celebrates her CELPIP success, ready for her nursing career in Canada.
props.paragraphQuote: I felt a wave of relief when I received my CELPIP results. Scoring CLB 9 was a dream come true. The test prepared me for real-life situations, which boosted my confidence. Now, I can focus on my nursing career in Canada while supporting my family back in Cebu. I’m grateful for the practice materials that helped me get here.

testimonials.name: Maria Santos
testimonials.quote: CELPIP helped me show my English skills. It was easy to prepare with their materials. I felt confident on test day!

testimonials.name: Jasmine Reyes
testimonials.quote: Taking CELPIP was a great choice. The test reflected real-life situations. I'm now one step closer to my nursing career in Canada!

props.heading: Visualising Your Journey to Canada as a Nurse

images.alt: Maria Santos studying for the CELPIP test
images.caption: Maria Santos preparing for the CELPIP test to demonstrate her English proficiency.

images.alt: A nurse working in a Canadian hospital
images.caption: Canadian employers recognise CELPIP scores, opening doors for nurses like Maria.
